_comment: Issue #367: Feature/design request with ZERO labels and ZERO comments — the whole directive is in the body. Pure label scan would never see it. Fix: unlabeled catch-all in Step 1 + body-only issue treatment in Step 2. Reference: issue-sweep SKILL.md Step 1 'unlabeled catch-all' and Step 2 'actionable signal can be the issue BODY'.

issue.body:
Analyze this feature and discuss any unclear points, then write an executable TDD plan; implement after I confirm.

We need a new `/stats` endpoint that returns the current provider mount counts.

expected.reason: Zero comments and body has no '> 🤖 AI Agent' response yet. Body-only issue with no labels should be captured by unlabeled catch-all and treated as unprocessed (the feature directive lives in the body itself).
